Functions.Name: ClearAllLocalNotifications
Functions.Description: Clear all pending local notifications. Typically this will be done before scheduling new notifications when going into the background

Functions.Name: ScheduleLocalNotificationAtTime
Functions.Description: Schedule a local notification at a specific time, inLocalTime specifies the current local time or if UTC time should be used

Params.Name: FireDateTime
Params.Description: The time at which to fire the local notification

Params.Name: LocalTime
Params.Description: If true the provided time is in the local timezone, if false it is in UTC

Params.Name: Title
Params.Description: The title of the notification

Params.Name: Body
Params.Description: The more detailed description of the notification

Params.Name: Action
Params.Description: The text to be displayed on the slider controller

Params.Name: ActivationEvent
Params.Description: A string that is passed in the delegate callback when the app is brought into the foreground from the user activating the notification

Functions.Name: ScheduleLocalNotificationFromNow
Functions.Description: Schedule a local notification to fire inSecondsFromNow from now

Params.Name: inSecondsFromNow
Params.Description: The seconds until the notification should fire

Params.Name: Title
Params.Description: The title of the notification

Params.Name: Body
Params.Description: The more detailed description of the notification

Params.Name: Action
Params.Description: The text to be displayed on the slider controller

Params.Name: ActivationEvent
Params.Description: A string that is passed in the delegate callback when the app is brought into the foreground from the user activating the notification

Functions.Name: ScheduleLocalNotificationBadgeAtTime
Functions.Description: Schedule a local notification badge at a specific time, inLocalTime specifies the current local time or if UTC time should be used

Params.Name: FireDateTime
Params.Description: The time at which to fire the local notification

Params.Name: LocalTime
Params.Description: If true the provided time is in the local timezone, if false it is in UTC

Params.Name: ActivationEvent
Params.Description: A string that is passed in the delegate callback when the app is brought into the foreground from the user activating the notification

Functions.Name: ScheduleLocalNotificationBadgeFromNow
Functions.Description: Schedule a local notification badge to fire inSecondsFromNow from now

Params.Name: inSecondsFromNow
Params.Description: The seconds until the notification should fire

Params.Name: ActivationEvent
Params.Description: A string that is passed in the delegate callback when the app is brought into the foreground from the user activating the notification

Functions.Name: CancelLocalNotification
Functions.Description: Cancel a local notification given the ActivationEvent

Params.Name: ActivationEvent
Params.Description: The string passed into the Schedule call for the notification to be cancelled

Functions.Name: GetLaunchNotification
Functions.Description: Get the local notification that was used to launch the app

Params.Name: NotificationLaunchedApp
Params.Description: Return true if a notification was used to launch the app

Params.Name: ActivationEvent
Params.Description: Returns the name of the ActivationEvent if a notification was used to launch the app

Params.Name: FireDate
Params.Description: Returns the time the notification was activated
